00384| // Export chains array and lookup
00385| export const supportedChains = [
00386|   base, 
00387|   baseSepolia, 
00388|   ethereum, 
00389|   bsc, 
00390|   arbitrum, 
00391|   berachain, 
00392|   avalanche, 
00393|   hyperliquid, 
00394|   polygon, 
00395|   optimism, 
00396|   linea, 
00397|   scroll, 
00398|   mantle, 
00399|   unichain, 
00400|   shape,
00401|   plume
00402| ] as const
00403| export const defaultChain = baseSepolia
00404| 
00405| // Chain lookup by ID
00406| export const chainById = {
00407|   [base.id]: base,
00408|   [baseSepolia.id]: baseSepolia,
00409|   [ethereum.id]: ethereum,
00410|   [bsc.id]: bsc,
00411|   [arbitrum.id]: arbitrum,
00412|   [berachain.id]: berachain,
00413|   [avalanche.id]: avalanche,
00414|   [hyperliquid.id]: hyperliquid,
00415|   [polygon.id]: polygon,
00416|   [optimism.id]: optimism,
00417|   [linea.id]: linea,
00418|   [scroll.id]: scroll,
00419|   [mantle.id]: mantle,
00420|   [unichain.id]: unichain,
00421|   [shape.id]: shape,
00422|   [plume.id]: plume,
00423| } as const
00424| 
00425| export type SupportedChainId = keyof typeof chainById
00426| 
00427| // Helper to get chain config
00428| export function getChainById(chainId: number) {
00429|   return chainById[chainId as SupportedChainId]
00430| }
00431| 
00432| // Helper to get RPC URL for a chain
00433| export function getRpcUrl(chainId: number): string {
00434|   const networkConfig = config.networks[chainId as keyof typeof config.networks]
00435|   if (!networkConfig) {
00436|     throw new Error(`Unsupported chain ID: ${chainId}`)
00437|   }
00438|   return networkConfig.rpcUrl
00439| }
00440| 
00441| // Helper to get simulation RPC URL for a chain
00442| export function getSimulationRpcUrl(chainId: number): string {
00443|   const networkConfig = config.networks[chainId as keyof typeof config.networks]
00444|   if (!networkConfig) {
00445|     throw new Error(`Unsupported chain ID: ${chainId}`)
00446|   }
00447|   return networkConfig.simulateV1RpcSupportedRpcUrl || networkConfig.rpcUrl
00448| }
00449| 
00450| // Helper to get explorer URL
00451| export function getExplorerUrl(chainId: number): string {
00452|   const networkConfig = config.networks[chainId as keyof typeof config.networks]
00453|   if (!networkConfig) {
00454|     throw new Error(`Unsupported chain ID: ${chainId}`)
00455|   }
00456|   return networkConfig.explorerUrl
00457| } 
</file>
